event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Several items were left behind on the Coat Dropoff at the end of the meet (coats, hats, water bottles). Please claim your item at the Info Tent at the next event. (And please label your items with your name, especially if you are going to forget them… That makes the organizers’ job easier.)
cumulative_event_comments: Several items were left behind on the Coat Dropoff at the end of the meet (coats, hats, water bottles). Please claim your item at the Info Tent at the next event.
